item.title: DedSec-Terminal Online
item.description:
DedSec-Terminal is now online.

This platform focuses on cybersecurity intelligence, data breaches, vulnerabilities, malware tracking, and security research.

Originally reported by: DedSec-Terminal

────────────────

“Trust arrives on foot and leaves on horseback.” — Dutch proverb
